headlines.title: Americans evacuated from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship en route to the U.S.
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak arrived early Sunday off the Spanish island of Tenerife, where the process of sending most passengers back to their home countries will get underway.

headlines.title: Birders push back on hantavirus fears tied to Argentine city
headlines.description: The hantavirus outbreak on a cruise that departed from Argentina last month has cast an unwelcome spotlight on Tierra del Fuego, a region well known for its biodiversity and bird-watching, authorities and guides say

headlines.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
headlines.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

headlines.title: He pitched military service with a promise of lifetime healthcare. When he needed it, the system failed.
headlines.description: For more than a decade, Guy Shoemaker pitched military service to potential new recruits with one key promise: healthcare for life.“You’re going to have medical and dental for the rest of your life,” said Shoemaker, a retired Army sergeant first class and recruiter who spent a year in Afghanistan.

headlines.title: ‘A watershed moment’: A pancreatic cancer drug is set to transform treatment
headlines.description: An experimental pancreatic cancer drug that’s been shown to double survival in patients with advanced stages of the disease is poised to revolutionize the way the cancer is treated, oncologists say.

headlines.title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
headlines.description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

headlines.title: Hantavirus-Plagued Cruise Arrives in Canary Islands
headlines.description: The ship at the heart of the deadly hantavirus outbreak has arrived in the Canary Islands. Crews in hazmat suits have begun the complicated task of screening and getting more than 100 passengers off the ship without potentially exposing themselves or the public to the virus. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdjian reports for Sunday TODAY.

headlines.title: Spanish island braces for hantavirus cruise ship as WHO urges calm
headlines.description: The head of the World Health Organization on Saturday made an appeal to locals in Tenerife to remain calm as the Spanish island prepared to receive passengers from a hantavirus-hit cruise ship that left three people dead. NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian reports.

headlines.title: CDC Set to Meet Americans From the Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship
headlines.description: The cruise ship dealing with a hantavirus outbreak will arrive near the Canary Islands on Sunday morning. The World Health Organization has confirmed a sixth case of the virus. The CDC says the risk to the public remains “extremely low” and has deployed a team to the Canary Islands to meet the 17 Americans trapped on the luxury cruise ship. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdijian reports and Dr. Akshay Syal joins Saturday TODAY to break down what to know about the disease.

headlines.title: New plan to evacuate Americans from Hantavirus cruise
headlines.description: The State Department is arranging a flight from the Canary Islands back to the U.S., where the 17 Americans on board the cruise ship will isolate at the national quarantine unit at Nebraska Medicine in Omaha. NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian reports.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.
